mods.unlockConfirm: Version and loader are synced with the selected profile. Change them anyway?
mods.syncedHint: Synced with profile. Click «Change» to unlock.
mods.nothingFound: Nothing found for the selected filters.
mods.nothingFoundModrinth: Nothing found for the selected Modrinth filters.
mods.nothingFoundCurseforge: Nothing found for the selected CurseForge filters.
mods.selectProject: Select a project on the left to see versions
mods.noAvailableVersions: There are no available versions for this project.
mods.saveSuccessWithDeps: File {{filename}} and {{count}} dependencies saved to profile.
mods.saveSuccessWithDepsSkipped: Saved {{downloaded}} file(s), skipped {{skipped}} (already in profile, matching SHA1).
mods.alreadyInstalled: {{filename}} and all dependencies are already installed in the profile.
mods.curseforgeModpackHint: CurseForge modpack saved as an archive. Automatic .mrpack import is only available for Modrinth.

directories.comingSoon: Directory settings will be added later.

gameDirectory.label: Game directory:
gameDirectory.hint: Versions, libraries, modpacks, worlds, and mods are stored here. Changing the folder copies your data automatically.

versions.noneFound: No versions found. Check your internet connection.

manage.reinstallHint: Pick a loader version. Base Minecraft version: {{gameVersion}}.

delete.title: Delete {{version}}?
delete.simplePrompt: Remove Minecraft {{version}} files? Shared libraries folder is not affected.

versions.loadFailed: Failed to load Minecraft versions list.

custom.importJarPrompt: Select client.jar for this version? (you can skip — the launcher will download it on install)
custom.importSuccess: Custom version {{version}} imported. Click Install to download libraries.

verify.failed: Failed to verify files for version {{version}}.
verify.notSupported: File verification is not supported for this loader.
verify.promptText: Issues were found in version {{version}}: missing {{missing}}, corrupted {{corrupted}} (checked {{checked}}). Overwrite files to restore proper operation?
verify.skipPrompt: Do not show this warning again

accentColor.label: Launcher accent color:
accentColor.svPadAria: Saturation and brightness for the current hue
accentColor.helpText: Ring: hue. Square: saturation and brightness. You can also type the HEX.

backgroundImage.label: Background image:
backgroundImage.hint: PNG, JPG, WebP, and GIF are supported (animations are preserved). The file is copied to the launcher data folder. “Reset” restores the default background.

resetSettings.success: Launcher settings have been reset to default values.

backup.title: Import / export
backup.hint: Export saves launcher settings to a file. Import applies settings from a file and overwrites current ones.

updates.noneFound: You're up to date. No new version available.
updates.installedRestart: Update installed. Please restart the launcher.
updates.availableNextStart: A new launcher version is available: {{version}}. Installation will be offered on the next start.
updates.checkFailed: Could not check for updates. You may already have the latest version.

javaSettings.description: Control which Java and JVM arguments the game will use. When custom arguments are disabled, the launcher applies safe default values.

useCustomArgs.label: Use custom JVM arguments
useCustomArgs.hint: When off, only launcher defaults are used.

preferIpv6.label: Prefer IPv6
preferIpv6.hint: Java will try to connect to servers over IPv6 (useful on CGNAT or IPv6-only networks).

javaPath.label: Java path
javaPath.hint: Leave empty to use Mojang built‑in runtime.

memory.title: JVM memory
memory.hint: It is recommended to leave 1–2 GB of RAM for the system and other apps.

jvmArgs.title: JVM arguments
jvmArgs.hint: Flags separated by spaces or new lines.

toast.loadFailedUsingDefaults: Failed to load Java settings. Using defaults.
toast.noSuitableRuntimes: No suitable Java runtimes found. Launcher will keep using Mojang runtime.
toast.validateOk: Java and JVM arguments validation passed.
toast.validateErrors: Errors detected while validating JVM arguments.

validation.minGreaterThanMax: MIN (Xms) cannot be greater than MAX (Xmx).
validation.maxAboveRecommended: MAX (Xmx) is above recommended limit. Use not more than {{gb}}GB.

banner.loadFailedHint: Check your internet connection or access to GitHub.

version.label: Version
version.snapshotHint: Looks like a snapshot. Enable “Show snapshot versions” in Settings → Versions.

console.title: Game console
console.empty: Logs will appear after the game starts.
console.hint: Controlled by the “Show console on game start” setting in the game section.

changeVersion.title: Change profile version
changeVersion.description: Mods, resource packs, shaders, and worlds stay in this profile and remain available after the version change. The selected Minecraft and loader versions will be installed. Mods built for the old version may need updating.
changeVersion.sameVersion: Choose a different Minecraft or loader version.

list.empty: No profiles yet. Click “Create” to add one.

presets.title: Build presets
presets.empty: No presets yet. Save profile options as a preset.
presets.applied: Preset applied to the create form.

contentUpdates.noneFound: All files on this tab are up to date (Modrinth and CurseForge).
contentUpdates.modalSubtitle: Newer versions are available for this profile.
contentUpdates.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one file to update.
contentUpdates.notOnModrinth: Files not found on Modrinth or CurseForge are skipped.

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.subtitle: Game
screenshots.empty: No screenshots yet. Take one in-game (F2) and it will show up here.
screenshots.selectHint: Select a screenshot from the gallery.

import.title: Import Modrinth pack

dropzone.title: Drag & drop a .mrpack file here
dropzone.hint: A new profile will be created with the pack name and game version from the .mrpack. Mods and resources will be downloaded automatically.

import.finishedWithVersion: Import finished. Profile created with pack's game version.

toast.selectLoaderBeforePreset: Select a loader version before saving the preset.
toast.noMatchingFiles: No matching files for this tab (check file extensions).
toast.manifestUrlFailed: Failed to resolve manifest URL for version {{version}}.
toast.versionNotInstalled: Version {{version}} is not installed. Starting download…
toast.profileCreatedInstallFailed: Profile created, but failed to install version: {{msg}}
toast.noProfilesFound: No profiles found. Try the launcher's root (not instances) — but instances is supported too.

manage.emptyTab: No files on this tab yet.
manage.dropHint: Drag files from Explorer here or use “Add”.
manage.splitResizeAria: Drag to resize the list and console
manage.splitResizeTitle: Drag to widen or narrow the list
manage.clearOnlyLive: Clear only applies to current output
manage.consoleResizeHint: Drag the bar between the list and console to resize — width is saved. Logs persist; before a new launch, output is archived.
manage.noVersionsForGame: No versions for the selected game

externalImport.title: Import from another launcher
externalImport.hint: Prefer PrismLauncher/MultiMC root (not instances), but instances input is supported too.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete confirmation
deleteConfirm.prompt: Delete profile “{{name}}”? This action cannot be undone.

profileSettingsModal.title: Profile settings
profileSettingsModal.hint: These settings apply only to the selected profile and are used when launching the game.

friends.subtitleSignedOut: Sign in to Supabase in the Accounts tab to use friends.
friends.signInFirst: Sign in first in the Accounts tab.
friends.noFriends: No friends yet. Send a request by nickname.

toast.signInFirst: Sign in first in the Accounts tab
toast.cannotAddSelf: You cannot send a request to yourself
toast.requestExists: Request already exists or you are already friends.

supabase.linkMicrosoftTitle: Sign in with Microsoft, then click Link again
supabase.linkElyTitle: Sign in with Ely.by, then click Link again

toast.nicknameTooShort: Nickname must be at least 3 characters.
toast.signInMicrosoftThenLink: Sign in with Microsoft, then click Link again.
toast.signInElyThenLink: Sign in with Ely.by, then click Link again.
toast.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
toast.envNotConfigured: VITE_SUPABASE_PROJECT_URL / VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY are not configured in .env
toast.noAccessToken: No Supabase access_token — sign in first.
toast.noRefreshToken: Failed to get refresh_token from Supabase response.
toast.noAccessTokenResponse: Failed to get access_token from Supabase response.
toast.refreshNoToken: Supabase refresh did not return access_token.
toast.nicknameLoginUnsupported: Supabase server does not support nickname login yet (users_resolve_login missing).
toast.nicknameEmailNotFound: No email found for this nickname.
toast.resolveLoginFailed: Failed to call users_resolve_login (nickname login). Usually CORS/OPTIONS in Edge Function. Sign in with email for now, then check CORS in users_resolve_login.

errors.connectionFailed: Cannot connect to Supabase. Check VITE_SUPABASE_PROJECT_URL (must be https://<project>.supabase.co), internet, and service availability.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password is too short. Minimum 6 characters.
errors.identityAlreadyLinked: {{provider}} is already linked to another 16launcher account. Unlink it there or use a different {{provider}} account.
errors.linkConnectionFailed: Failed to link {{provider}}: no connection to Supabase. Check internet and project settings.

accounts.removeConfirm: Remove this account from the list? Saved credentials for it will be deleted.
accounts.hint: Configure your profile and appearance after you sign in.
accounts.elyDialogTitle: If the page in your browser is loading forever:
accounts.elyDialogTip: It is better to open it in a new tab of the same browser. In another browser Ely.by may show “Invalid request”.

toast.elyLoggedOut: You have logged out of Ely.by.
toast.elyLogoutFailed: Failed to log out from Ely.by.
toast.elyOpenBrowserFailed: Could not open the browser for Ely.by sign-in.
toast.msLoginFailed: Failed to sign in with Microsoft.
toast.msOpenBrowserFailed: Could not open the browser for Microsoft sign-in.
toast.msLoggedOut: You have logged out of Microsoft.
toast.msLogoutFailed: Failed to log out of Microsoft.

social.discord:
Join our Discord!
Chat with the team and share your emotions!
social.telegram:
Follow our Telegram!
Get the latest launcher updates!

help.title: About Launcher
help.mainInfo: 16Launcher is a free Minecraft launcher with support for Fabric, Forge, Quilt, NeoForge.
help.mojangDisclaimer:
NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT.

16Launcher is in no way affiliated with Mojang Studios, nor should it be considered a project endorsed by Mojang Studios.
help.apis: We use Modrinth, CurseForge and Ely.by APIs

errors.forgeVersionsLoadFailed: Failed to load Forge versions. Check access to files.minecraftforge.net: {{msg}}

warnings.selectProfileFirst: Select a profile first, then click “Play”.

pinnedProfiles.pinLimit: You can pin up to 3 profiles.
pinnedProfiles.fabricNotInstalled: Fabric profile is not installed for this version.
pinnedProfiles.quiltNotInstalled: Quilt profile is not installed for this version.

versionBadge.unknown: Update status will be known after a check

install.noFabricLoader: No suitable Fabric Loader for this version
install.noNeoForgeLoader: No suitable NeoForge build for this version

welcome.title: Welcome to 16Launcher!
welcome.subtitle: Let's set everything up to your taste

language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change the language later in launcher settings

account.title: Sign in
account.subtitle: Pick a sign-in method or skip — you can sign in later
account.elyDesc: For Ely profile and Ely.by skins

ely.title: Sign in with Ely.by
ely.subtitle: Enter your Ely credentials or open browser sign-in
ely.securityHint: Credentials are stored locally on your device and used only for game sign-in.
ely.errorGeneric: Sign-in failed. Check your login and password.

microsoft.title: Sign in with Microsoft
microsoft.subtitle: Use your official Minecraft account. After clicking the button, Microsoft authorization will open.
microsoft.externalHint: An external browser window will open for secure Microsoft sign-in.

finish.title: All set!
finish.subtitle: Setup is complete. Head to the launcher and start playing.
